# Third Party Licenses and Acknowledgements

The majority of the HiGHS source code is available under the MIT license.

Code in the `/extern` directory was originally developed by third parties and
is licensed under additional licenses.

## amd

The source code in `/extern/amd` is distributed under the BSD-3-Clause license.
It was originally developed by Timothy Davis. HiPO is disabled by default, so
this component is not expected in the packaged MIT runtime.

## cli

The source code in `/extern/CLI11.hpp` uses a BSD-3-Clause-compatible license.
CLI11 is used to parse command-line input for the HiGHS executable. Its full
license is included in `licenses/CLI11-LICENSE.txt`.

## metis

The source code in `/extern/metis` is distributed under Apache-2.0. HiPO is
disabled by default, so this component is not expected in the packaged MIT
runtime.

## pdqsort

The source code in `/extern/pdqsort` is distributed under the zlib license. Its
full license is included in `licenses/pdqsort-LICENSE.txt`.

## rcm

The source code in `/extern/rcm` is distributed under MIT. HiPO is disabled by
default, so this component is not expected in the packaged MIT runtime.

## zstr

The source code in `/extern/zstr` is distributed under MIT. Its full license is
included in `licenses/zstr-LICENSE.txt`.

Upstream notice:
https://github.com/ERGO-Code/HiGHS/blob/v1.15.1/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md
